titleStmt.title: SII 42.261: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 261. (A.R. No. 24 of 1956-57.) Bellamkoṇḍavāripālem (hamlet of Nāgulavaram), Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab on the roadside about 6 miles from Nāgārjunakoṇḍa.
Dated in Śaka 1438, Dhāta, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Tuesday, corresponding to A.D. 1516, June 10.

Registers a grant of the villages Guṇḍāla and Malyaguṇḍla situated in the Nāgārjunikoṇḍasīma to god Guṇḍāla-Tirumaladēva by Śaṅkhanāyini-Basavānāyinigāru, for the merit of his paternal uncle Tipi-nēḍu, aunt Chennama, father Nāgi-nēḍu, mother Annama, and his young brothers Bhīmayya and Mādayya. States that Nāgārjunikoṇḍa-sīma was held by the donor as nāyaṅkara obtained from Sāḷuva Timmarasayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of moon, Garutman(?), discus, tīrunāmam, serpent, conch, sage and sun.

śubhamastu [.] samastuṁggaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē [.] trailōkya nagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya śā(śaṁ)bhavē [.] svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śata(ka)va¨rṣaṁbulu 1438 Agunēṭi dhāta saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha su(śu) 11 ma . guṁḍā
la tirumaladēvaraku śaṁkhanāyani basvānāyanigāru daṁḍaṁ veṭṭiIccina bhū
dāna dha[¨r]mma śāsanapramāṇaṁ sāḷuva tiṁmaruna(sa)yyavāru nāyaṁkka
rānaku yiccina nāgā¨rjuni koṁḍa sīmalōnu nāgulavarānaku dakṣiṇapu dikku
guṁḍālagrāmamuṁnnu malyeguṁḍlamuṁ I (Ī) reṁḍu grāmāluṁnnu
yī tathātithini prathama Ēkādasi(śī) puṇyakālamaṁdu tama pe
dataṁḍri tipenēnikiṁni pedatalli cennamakuṁnnu tama taṁḍri nāgi
nēnikiṁni tamatalli Aṁnammakuṁnnutama pinamarā nikiṁni tamaku ya
taṁmulu bhīmaṁyya mādayyakuṁnu puna ma sānaṁ cēsi
raghunāthani saṁnithi(dhi)ni sahiraṇyōdakadāna dhārāpū¨rvvakamugānu dhāravōsi Istimi . gu
ṁḍāla tirumalayya tāmu dhāravōsi yiccina guṁḍāla grāmānāmalyeguṁ
ḍāla grāmānā catussīmāgala nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇa Āgāmi siddha
sādhya Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmētalunu trivācikānu trikaraṇasadhi(śuddhi)gā Ācaṁdrā¨rka
sthāyigānu dhāravōsi yistimi [.] grāmarokhaṁgānu garimagarivu ba
ya mā 190 ki Arasēnu cellumi [.] I (Ī)dha¨rmaṁ ya(E)vvaru sāgiṁccini(na) vāriki
Āyurārōgya Ayi(Ai)śva¨ryābhivridhi(vṛddhi) putrapautrābhividhi(vṛddhi)ni dhanakana
kavastuvāhana samridhi(mṛddhi)ni kaligi dēvuni kṛpanu bratukuduru [.] I(Ī)dha¨rma ni
¨rṇayānaku ya(E)vvaru tappinānu lōnu gōvu brāhmaṇa vadhānu
mātṛpitṛ vadhānu cēsina pāpāna bōvuvāru turukalu Airā pa
ṁdidiṁnna(tinna) pāpānaṁbōduru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupāla
naṁ [.] paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ(ttaṁ) vā parada
ttaṁvā yō harēti vasuṁdharām [.] ṣaṣṭhi(ṣṭi)va¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ [.] yōdēva bhaginī lōkē sa¨rvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ(m) .
na bhōgyā nakaragrāhyā dēvadattā vasuṁdharā . śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 42.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
